design_philosophy.core_loop: Select track and vehicle, complete lap(s) within time limit while managing realistic car physics and stunt execution
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balancing speed and precision through realistic vehicle control (manual transmission, clutch, four-wheel physics modeling) against the clock
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Experience authentic sports car driving with real-world physics simulation, executing advanced driving stunts in controlled environments
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Commitment to realistic car physics simulation over arcade accessibility; requires players to master manual transmission, clutch operation, and four-wheel dynamics rather than simplifying controls. Prioritizes technical driving simulation (two-wheel to four-wheel modeling evolution) over competitive racing against AI opponents

difficulty.continues_system: Time limit per attempt; arcade continues via coin insertion
difficulty.checkpointing: Single run format; instant replay feature allows reviewing performance but no mid-race checkpoints
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Players choose between manual transmission (4-speed shifter with clutch, stalling risk) and automatic transmission, and select from three tracks of varying complexity (Autocross ~30 seconds, original ~90 seconds, Super Stunt ~3 minutes)

progression.unlock_mechanism: Track selection available from start; vehicle selection (3-4 cars with different transmission types); expanded PlayStation version adds 5 additional vehicles and 3 new tracks
replayability_hooks: Three distinct tracks with different length and complexity profiles
Multiple vehicle options with varying characteristics
Instant Replay feature for performance analysis
Buddy Race mode racing against previous player recordings
Linked multiplayer racing (arcade cabinet to cabinet)
Two-player alternating and simultaneous modes on home versions

world_building_techniques: Dashboard instruments and gauges create authentic cockpit immersion
First-person windshield perspective establishes driver identity
Unique dashboard design per vehicle reinforces vehicle differentiation
Track design tells implicit story (stunt track with ramps and loops, autocross technical layout, super stunt mountain road and cylindrical tunnel)

environmental_storytelling: Stunt track design with dual landing ramps and jump loop progression
Super Stunt track enhanced obstacles: corkscrew loop, mountain road, 45° inclined hill, cylindrical tunnel
Track variety (speed vs technical) communicates different driving philosophies
Dashboard displays (speedometer, tachometer, fuel level, oil, temp, amp gauges) emphasize realistic systems mastery
